def merge_ranges(ranges)
  return [] if ranges.empty?
  
  sorted = ranges.sort_by [[SLOT sort_block]]
  merged = [[[SLOT initial_pick]]]
  
  sorted[1..-1].each do |current|
    last = merged[-1]
    
    if [[SLOT overlap_check]]
      merged[-1] = [[SLOT merged_replace]]
    else
      merged << current
    end
  end
  
  merged
end
